mapper.sql: alevel_question_option_id, alevel_question_id, option_key, option_html, option_text, structure_json, sort_order, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_question_option WHERE alevel_question_id = #{questionId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, alevel_question_option_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE alevel_question_option option_row INNER JOIN alevel_question question_row ON question_row.alevel_question_id = option_row.alevel_question_id SET option_row.status = 0, option_row.update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE question_row.alevel_paper_id = #{paperId} AND question_row.delete_flag = '1' AND option_row.status = 1 AND option_row.delete_flag = '1'
